sys_script_client.description: As a Tasker User, with Template Designer Permissions on a "New Top Task Template" form loaded from the Template Portal, I will see one checkbox labeled "Select to Create Multiple Subtask Templates" which will allow me to create a Top task template assigned to a single Primary Assignee as well as create multiple subtask templates assigned to multiple Primary Assignee OUs and/or Assigned Members.
sys_script_client.name: Template Task- onLoad multi-selects
